steps.text: Overview · Avails by Date and Channel

steps.expression: (() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); if (!root) return false; const text = root.innerText || root.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Overview · Avails by Date and Channel') && document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-chart-legend-action').length >= 2; })()

(() => { const actions = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-chart-action')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return actions.includes('Keep only'); })()

Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-refinement-chip')).some((node) => { const text = (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim(); return text.includes('Keep only = Display'); })

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview th')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return labels.includes('Channel') && labels.includes('Actions'); })()

(() => { const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview tbody tr')); if (rows.length === 0) return false; return rows.every((row) => { const cells = row.querySelectorAll('td'); return ((cells[1]?.innerText || cells[1]?.textContent || '').trim()) === 'Display'; }); })()
